command.grant_description: Grant temporary voice command access to a player
message.players_muted: All non-admin players have been muted.
message.players_muted_ct: All non-admin CT players have been muted.
message.players_muted_t: All non-admin T players have been muted.
message.players_muted_timer: All non-admin players have been muted for {0} seconds.
message.players_muted_timer_ct: All non-admin CT players have been muted for {0} seconds.
message.players_muted_timer_t: All non-admin T players have been muted for {0} seconds.
message.auto_unmuted: All players have been automatically unmuted after {0} seconds.
message.round_end_mute: All players muted due to round end.
message.round_start_unmute: All players unmuted at round start.
message.threshold_mute_enabled: Voice chat muted: server reached {0} players. Only admins can speak.
message.threshold_mute_disabled: Voice chat restored: player count dropped below {0}.
message.permission_granted: Temporary voice command access granted to {0} until map change.
message.permission_granted_target: You have been granted temporary access to voice commands until the map changes.
message.permission_revoked: Temporary voice command access revoked from {0}.
message.permission_revoked_target: Your temporary access to voice commands has been revoked.
message.permission_expired: Your temporary access to voice commands has expired due to map change.
error.no_permission: You don't have permission to use this command. Required: {0}
error.players_only: This command can only be used by players.
error.missing_argument: You must specify a team filter: @ct, @t, or @all
error.grant_missing_target: You must specify a player name, userid (#id), or slot number.
error.target_is_bot: You cannot grant permissions to bots.
